return(function(w,b,W,O,e,t,v,D,G,p,Z,S,F,l,E,V,H,U,g,j,P,N,J)p,l,G,S,P,J,U,Z,j,V,N,E,g,D,F,H={},{},function(w)p[w]=p[w]-(-864719-(-864720))if p[w]==-217694-(-217694)then p[w],l[w]=nil,nil end
